en: Welcome to Kafi Group! 👋 I'm here to help you explore our premium food products. What would you like to know about?
Hello! Welcome to Kafi Group — sourcing excellence since 1982. How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm the KAFI Assistant. Feel free to ask me about our rice, Himalayan pink salt, spices, or any other products!
ur: Kafi Group mein khush aamdeed! 👋 Main aapki madad ke liye haazir hoon. Aap kia janna chahenge?
Assalam o Alaikum! Kafi Group mein aapka khair-maqdam hai. Main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon?
Salam! Main KAFI Assistant hoon. Hamare chawal, namak, masale ya kisi bhi product ke baare mein poochein!

en:
We offer products across 8 categories:

🌾 Basmati & Non-Basmati Rice
🧂 Himalayan Pink Salt
🍜 Vermicelli, Pheni & Kunafa Dough
🫙 Condiments
🌶️ Authentic Spices & Blends
🍮 Desserts
🧃 Juices & Natural Extracts
🥜 Snacks & Wellness

Which category would you like to explore?
ur:
Hamare 8 categories mein products hain:

🌾 Basmati aur Non-Basmati Chawal
🧂 Himalayan Pink Salt
🍜 Seviyan, Pheni aur Kunafa
🫙 Condiments
🌶️ Masale aur Blends
🍮 Desserts
🧃 Juices aur Extracts
🥜 Snacks aur Wellness

Kaunsi category dekhna chahenge?

en: I'm the KAFI Assistant — an AI-powered product guide for Kafi Group. I can help you explore our products, answer questions, and connect you with our team. How can I help?
I'm an intelligent assistant built for Kafi Group to help you find the right products and information. What would you like to know?
ur: Main KAFI Assistant hoon — Kafi Group ka AI product guide. Main aapko hamare products ke baare mein bata sakta hoon aur hamari team se connect kar sakta hoon.
Main Kafi Group ka zehan-daar assistant hoon jo aapki madad ke liye banaya gaya hai. Kaise madad karun?

en: I appreciate the friendly chat! 😊 I'm best at helping with Kafi Group products and services though. Can I help you with something from our product range?
Great question, but I'm focused on being your best product assistant! Would you like to explore our rice, salt, or other premium products?
ur: Aapki dosti ki qadar karta hoon! 😊 Lekin main Kafi Group ke products aur services mein behtar madad kar sakta hoon. Koi product dekhna chahenge?
Shukriya! Lekin mera kaam Kafi Group ke products mein madad karna hai. Chawal, namak ya koi aur product dekhein?

en: Thank you for visiting Kafi Group! 🙏 If you need anything else, feel free to come back anytime. Have a great day!
Thanks for chatting with us! Don't hesitate to reach out whenever you need assistance. Take care! 👋
It was great helping you! Remember, you can also reach us at exports@kafi-group.com or WhatsApp +92-300-8206633. Goodbye! 🌟
ur: Kafi Group mein aane ka shukriya! 🙏 Agar kuch aur chahiye to kabhi bhi aa jayein. Aapka din acha guzre!
Baat kar ke khushi hui! Jab bhi zaroorat ho, hamare WhatsApp +92-300-8206633 par rabta karein. Khuda Hafiz! 👋

en: No problem! Is there anything else I can help you with?
Alright! Feel free to ask about anything else — products, shipping, or ordering.
ur: Koi baat nahi! Kya kuch aur madad kar sakta hoon?
Theek hai! Koi aur sawal ho to zaroor poochein.

en:
I'm sorry to hear you're facing an issue. Let me connect you with our team right away. You can reach us at:

📧 info@kafi-group.com
📞 +92-300-8206633
💬 WhatsApp: +92-300-8206633

We'll resolve this as quickly as possible.
ur:
Mujhe afsos hai ke aapko mushkil ho rahi hai. Abhi hamari team se rabta karein:

📧 info@kafi-group.com
📞 +92-300-8206633
💬 WhatsApp: +92-300-8206633

Hum jaldi se jaldi hal karenge.

en:
You can view our complete product catalogue here:
📖 Product Catalogue: https://online.fliphtml5.com/Kafi-Essence/zfua/#p=1
📄 Company Profile: https://kafi-group.com/kafi-commodites-profile.pdf

Would you like to know about any specific products?
ur:
Hamara complete product catalogue yahaan dekhein:
📖 Product Catalogue: https://online.fliphtml5.com/Kafi-Essence/zfua/#p=1
📄 Company Profile: https://kafi-group.com/kafi-commodites-profile.pdf

Koi specific product ke baare mein janna chahenge?

en:
I'm not sure I understood that. Could you rephrase? You can ask me about:

🌾 Our products (rice, salt, spices, desserts...)
📦 Packaging and weights
🚢 Shipping and exports
📞 Contacting our team

Or just say 'products' to see everything!
Hmm, I didn't quite catch that. Try asking about our product categories, packaging details, or how to place an order!
I want to make sure I help you right! Could you try rephrasing your question? I'm great with product info, ordering, and shipping queries.
ur:
Mujhe samajh nahi aaya. Kya aap dobaara phrasing kar sakte hain? Aap mujhse ye pooch sakte hain:

🌾 Hamare products (chawal, namak, masale...)
📦 Packaging aur weight
🚢 Shipping aur export
📞 Hamari team se rabta

Ya bas 'products' likhein!
Thori mushkil hui samajhne mein. Hamare products, packaging, ya ordering ke baare mein poochein!
